# UX//Raw — Nadir Shaikh

> UX//Raw is the portfolio of Nadir Shaikh, a UI/UX designer and frontend developer based in Mumbai, India. With 7+ years of end-to-end design experience, Nadir works across the full design stack — from user research and UX strategy through to design systems and frontend implementation. He is open to freelance projects and long-term collaboration.

## Site

- [Home](https://uxraw.vercel.app/): Portfolio homepage. Covers Nadir's background, selected work, design process (Discover → Define → Design → Deliver), expertise areas (App Design, Web Design, Design Systems, UX Strategy, Prototyping), experience timeline, and FAQ.
- [Work](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/): Full portfolio archive. 9 case studies spanning healthcare, enterprise, marketplace, real estate, and branding. Filterable by UI/UX, Web, and Branding.
- [Contact](https://uxraw.vercel.app/contact/): Contact page. Includes a project enquiry form, direct email/phone, timezone (IST, GMT+5:30), and availability status. Currently open to freelance.

## Case Studies

- [AESM TAP — Talent Acquisition Portal](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/aesm-tap/): Enterprise UX for Anglo-Eastern, a shipping group managing 80,000+ seafarers globally. Digitised 10+ paper forms, unified 3 disconnected platforms, and introduced maritime-specific candidate search with RBAC approval routing across web and mobile. Disciplines: UX Research, UI Design, Design System, Prototyping, Dev Handoff. Year: 2025.
- [We Care (Redesign)](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/we-care-aesm/): Healthcare mobile app redesign. UI/UX Design. Year: 2025.
- [Renttro](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/renttro/): Marketplace platform for web and mobile. Year: 2025.
- [Finder](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/finder/): Consumer food and offers app. UI/UX Design. Year: 2025.
- [AI Scribe](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/ai-scribe/): AI-powered healthcare product design. Year: 2025.
- [Uberheal](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/uberheal/): Healthcare SaaS — operations platform design. Year: 2025.
- [Ignite](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/ignite/): Enterprise idea management platform — branding and UI design. Year: 2024.
- [Vaviya Developers](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/vaviya-developers/): Real estate website design. Year: 2024.
- [Welspun Michigan](https://uxraw.vercel.app/work/welspun-michigan/): Enterprise 3D web experience design. Year: 2024.

## About Nadir Shaikh

Nadir Shaikh is a Mumbai-based UI/UX designer and frontend developer with 7+ years of experience across product design, design systems, UX strategy, branding, and frontend implementation. He currently works at Werq Labs, an AI-native product studio, where he owns the design process end-to-end — from research and strategy through to frontend implementation. He also takes on freelance engagements with startups and creative teams.

His design process follows four phases: Discover (user research, interviews, analytics), Define (personas, user flows, information architecture), Design (Figma, prototyping, UI systems), and Deliver (documentation, frontend, testing).

**Core disciplines:** UI/UX Design · Web Design · App Design · Design Systems · UX Strategy & Research · Prototyping & Interaction · Branding · Frontend Development

**Toolstack:** Figma · Adobe Creative Suite · FigJam · HTML · CSS · JavaScript · AI tools

**Industries worked in:** Maritime · Healthcare · Technology · Fashion · Hospitality · Logistics · Real Estate
